caption: Hey Sleepy! I made this app just for you so I can update you on my trip! 💕
On my way to see you before my trip! Just a little something for my sleepy.
Saw these cute bears in the car and couldn't help but think of you. Missing you so much! Featuring my mom who has already annoyed everyone by asking 3 sperare guys for help lol.
Just left NYC! Sailed under the bridge and thought of our recent flea market visit. I miss you the most!
Sea day for us today. Not much to do but drink! Perfect for sleepy!
You're lucky you aren't here or else these snails would be in your future! Miss you the most.
Me drinking. They know my name and order already. Heaven on earth (sea).
Got sushi for vinny. The other room had hibanci so it made me think of my sleepy pie.
The biggest surf shop in the USA! I bought more for you than myself lol.
